title: BREAKING: Iran may have accepted the terms of the deal proposed by US, possible deadline extension - Markets react stocks up oil down
snippet: Iran may have accepted the terms of the deal initially proposed by the US signaling a possible deadline extension. Markets react with stocks up and oil down as investors expect a ceasefire.

title: BREAKING: Iran will accept a two-week ceasefire
snippet: Iran will accept a two-week ceasefire.

title: BREAKING: Official Iranian source - Iran inclined to accept two-week ceasefire out of respect for Pakistani mediator
snippet: An official Iranian source told Al-Araby Al-Jadeed newspaper: Iran is inclined to accept a two-week ceasefire out of respect for the Pakistani mediator.

title: Trump warns whole civilization will die tonight unless Iran agrees to deal
snippet: Trump warns whole civilization will die tonight, never to be brought back again, if Iran does not agree to deal to end war.

title: Trump Truth Social: If Iran does not agree to ceasefire by 8PM ET, will hit power plants bridges civilian sites
snippet: Trump Truth Social post ramps up pressure: If Iran does not agree to ceasefire including reopening Strait of Hormuz by 8 PM ET, will hit power plants, bridges and civilian sites, warning a whole civilization will die tonight.

title: Bond market reacting to temporary cease fire with Trump and Iran - not a full deal
snippet: The Bond market is reacting in a way that there will be a temporary cease fire with Trump and Iran. Not a full deal.

title: War in Iran cost US taxpayers $44 billion in 38 days - Pentagon first week $11.3 billion
snippet: The war in Iran has cost US taxpayers $44.0 billion in 38 days. Pentagon told Congress first week alone cost $11.3 billion.

title: BREAKING: Deal expected to be closed between US and Iran tonight, per CNN - Pakistan army chief mediating
snippet: A deal is expected to be closed between the US and Iran tonight, per CNN. A regional source informed CNN that some good news is expected from both sides soon. Discussions steered directly by Pakistan army chief.

title: BREAKING: US-Iran talks centering on deadline extension not a deal - Trump deadline 3 hours away per WSJ
snippet: US-Iran talks now centering around getting a deadline extension not a deal, as Trump deadline is 3 hours away, per WSJ. White House says Trump response to Pakistan 2-week extension request is coming.

title: Brent crude hits all-time record $144.46 per barrel
snippet: 4 months ago US gas prices dropping below $2 per gallon was a real possibility. Today dated Brent hit its highest level on record at $144.46 per barrel.

title: JUST IN: Iran threatens to target Saudi Aramco and key pipelines if Trump attacks Iranian power plants
snippet: Iran threatens to target worlds largest oil company Saudi Aramco and key pipelines if President Trump attacks Iranian power plants.

title: Container Ship Sinks In Hormuz After Iranian Strike - UBS Strait of Hormuz update
snippet: Container Ship Sinks In Hormuz After Iranian Strike Last Month; UBS Gives Latest Strait Update. Developments around Strait of Hormuz remain mixed.
